summary: Iteration 2 — TR/EN localization + Cloudinary upload. Backend: 13/13 pytest passed including new EN category/item fields, Cloudinary signature auth+folder-guard, and bilingual CRUD. Frontend: language toggle (TR/EN) works, persists in localStorage 'arikosk_lang' across reloads, switches category tabs (Çorbalar↔Soups), item names (Adana Kebap↔Adana Kebab, Mercimek Çorbası↔Lentil Soup) and section labels. Admin form has form-lang-tr/form-lang-en tabs, EN toggles to form-name-en/form-description-en (TR fields unmount), old form-image URL input is removed, ImageUpload widget present with image-upload-btn/image-file-input. Bilingual create via UI persisted with name_en/description_en (verified via API).

issues: When editing.image === '' (no image yet), an is still rendered inside the frame — triggers React warning 'An empty string ("") was passed to the src attribute'. Suggest render only when value is non-empty (which the outer conditional already does — looks like the warning is emitted before value renders; consider explicit `value ? : ` guard already present, but the empty string may be entering value via editing.image=''). Non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Suppress the empty-src React warning in ImageUpload when value is an empty string (guard with `value && `).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `import time as _time` sits mid-file; move to top-level imports for consistency.
Cloudinary secret is only checked inside the signature route — good; folder allow-list ('arikosk/') prevents cross-tenant abuse.
AdminDashboard.jsx save() does not validate required fields (name/price); backend will accept but user gets no feedback if e.g. name empty. Consider client-side required attrs.
ImageUpload does not fall back if Cloudinary signature endpoint returns 500 (misconfigured secret); relies on generic toast — OK.
LangContext STRINGS is a 100+ line dict; fine for now, but could split into /locales/{tr,en}.json when it grows.
seed_data_creation: None persistent. TEST_UI_Bilingual + TEST_Bilingual items were created and cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iteration 2 features (TR/EN + Cloudinary signature + bilingual CRUD + ImageUpload widget) all pass. Prior 'Mercimek Çorbası' missing item from iteration 1 is now present (seed backfill fixed drift). Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover: categories name_en, seeded items name_en/description_en, cloudinary signature (401/400/200 + folder guard), bilingual CRUD. Frontend testids verified: lang-toggle, lang-tr, lang-en, form-lang-tr, form-lang-en, form-name, form-name-en, form-description, form-description-en, image-upload, image-upload-btn, image-file-input. Old form-image testid confirmed REMOVED.
